chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P. No. D-577 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For orders on CMA No.6055/2019. 2. For orders on CMA No.2525/2019. 3. For hearing of CMA No.2526/2019. 4. For hearing of main case. 08.04.2026. Mr. Aamer Latif, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Manzoor Hussain Khan, advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG. --------------- The petitioner, M/s Geofman Pharmaceutical (Pvt.) Ltd., has filed the instant petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, seeking, inter alia, to call for the record and proceedings of Case No. 48/2016 and Appeal No. KAR-91/2018, and to set aside the order dated 25.09.2018 and judgment dated 11.01.2019, whereby respondent No.1 was reinstated in service with full back benefits. However, the matter has remained dormant since 2019 without any progress. Today, learned counsel appearing on behalf of the petitioner states that he has returned the brief to his client and presently has no instructions to proceed with the matter. In view of the above circumstances and conduct of the petitioner company, this Court finds no option but to dismiss the petition for non-prosecution. JUDGE Shahzad Soomro JUDGE
